name: Phi-1.5 (1.3B)
note: Base LM extending Phi-1's textbook-quality synthetic data to common-sense reasoning and NLU; near-SOTA under 10B params, MIT-licensed.

results.notes: zero-shot accuracy, Table 2 of technical report
Zero-shot accuracy, Table 2 (Common Sense Reasoning Benchmarks) of the phi-1.5 technical report.
Zero-shot pass@1, Table 4 (Multi-Step Reasoning Benchmarks); paper labels this result 'via coding' — the model solves math problems by generating code rather than direct chain-of-thought text.

Hugging Face Open LLM Leaderboard v2 official auto-eval run for microsoft/phi-1_5 (0-shot, strict prompt-level accuracy; Official Providers: true). Expectedly low since phi-1.5 is a base pretrained model, not instruction-tuned, but this is a real, verified public score not currently in the catalog.

Hugging Face Open LLM Leaderboard v2 official auto-eval run for microsoft/phi-1_5 (3-shot, normalized score). Near-floor result consistent with a 1.3B base model under the harder v2 methodology, but genuinely new/untracked for this model. [score corrected during round-6 completeness verify: proposed 7.5 -> 33.31]

Hugging Face Open LLM Leaderboard v2 official auto-eval run for microsoft/phi-1_5 (0-shot, random-baseline-normalized score, so near-zero reflects near-chance raw accuracy). Not previously tracked. [score corrected during round-6 completeness verify: proposed 2.3 -> 25.76]

Hugging Face Open LLM Leaderboard v2 official auto-eval run for microsoft/phi-1_5 (5-shot). Not previously tracked (the file only has the original 2-shot MMLU number from the technical report). [score corrected during round-6 completeness verify: proposed 7.7 -> 16.91]

Hugging Face Open LLM Leaderboard v2 'MATH Lvl 5' slice (hardest tier only, 4-shot) of the Hendrycks MATH test set. Not previously tracked for this model at all (no MATH benchmark currently on file). [score corrected during round-6 completeness verify: proposed 1.8 -> 1.13]

verificationNotes: Existence, 1.3B params, MIT license, 2048 ctx and Sept 2023 release all confirmed on Microsoft's HF card and technical report. Fetched the actual arXiv 2309.05463 HTML and confirmed all four benchmark rows verbatim: winogrande 0.734 (73.4), arc-challenge 0.444 (44.4), humaneval 34.1, mbpp 37.7. No discrepancies found.
